name: bluesky-keyword-alerts
description: Find bounded public Bluesky keyword, handle, mention, and hashtag results through Telemark Digital's Apify Actor.

interface.shortDescription: Bounded Bluesky post discovery through Apify.
interface.longDescription: Find recent public Bluesky posts for keywords, handles, mentions, and hashtags, then use the published Apify Task workflows when recurring only-new monitoring is needed.
defaultPrompt: Find recent Bluesky posts about product research.
Preview public Bluesky mentions for this handle.
Set up saved-Task monitoring for this keyword.
